nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Upper Guinean forests
nodes.summary: The Upper Guinean forests is a tropical seasonal forest region of West Africa.

nodes.name: 西非
nodes.summary: 西非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括白腹珍珠雞、绿冠蕉鹃、Black-throated coucal等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Melancholy woodpecker
nodes.summary: Melancholy woodpecker（Melancholy woodpecker，学名 Dendropicos lugubris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in West Africa from Sierra Leone east to Nigeria, living in forests, forest edges, clearings and woodlands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This woodpecker is found in the Upper Guinean forests of West Africa, in Cameroon, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Liberia, Nigeria, Sierra Leone and Togo. Its habitat is open forest, forest edges, clearings, secondary forest and woodlands, up to in elevation. It is also found in swamps, plantations and gardens

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: This woodpecker is found in the Upper Guinean forests of West Africa, in Cameroon, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Liberia, Nigeria, Sierra Leone and Togo. Its habitat is open forest, forest edges, clearings, secondary forest and woodlands, up to in elevation. It is also found in swamps, plantations and gardens
